notes: phi == psi iff they share truth value under every assignment (def:truth-assignment). 'The truth value of phi under v' is v-hat(phi), well-defined by thm:unique-extension-truth-assignment -- a Rule-4 well-definedness dep, and the workhorse the algebra theorems also cite. Candidate: the extension object itself is def:extended-truth-assignment (0094); the cite of the uniqueness theorem rather than the definition is a granularity choice the reviewer may standardize. This is the node the whole ==-convention rests on.
